wine_schools.name: Vintage Class Wine Academy (Vinclass)
wine_schools.address: Av. Castilla 43, 09400 Aranda de Duero, Burgos, Spain
program_types: WSET Level 2 in Wines and Spirits
Ribera del Duero specialist tasting course
wine_schools.description: The only WSET-approved provider based within Ribera del Duero, founded 2004 by Jeni Wilson DipWSET in Aranda de Duero. Official WSET Levels 1-3 in both Spanish and English; Wine Scholar Guild Spanish Wine Professional programme; and a regional specialist Ribera del Duero course. Highly cited as the primary professional wine education destination in the appellation.

verified.address_quoted: Av. Castilla, 43, 09400 Aranda de Duero, Burgos, Espana

wine_schools.name: Certified Ribera del Duero Wine Educator Program
wine_schools.address: C/ Hospital 6, 09300 Roa de Duero, Burgos, Spain
program_types: Certified Ribera del Duero Wine Educator immersion
certifications_offered: Certified Ribera del Duero Wine Educator
wine_schools.description: Intensive 5-day regional immersion programme run by the DO Ribera del Duero regulatory council (headquartered at Hospital 6, Roa de Duero). Designed for professional wine educators, sommeliers and communicators with at least 3 years' experience; includes masterclasses, themed tastings and winemaker meetings. Second edition ran April 2026.

wine_schools.name: Bodegas Protos Wine Workshop
wine_schools.address: C/ Bodegas Protos 24-28, 47300 Penafiel, Valladolid, Spain
wine_schools.description: Producer-led wine education workshops at Bodegas Protos in Penafiel. Sessions cover sensory analysis, vertical tastings of the Protos Crianza-to-Gran-Reserva range, and the influence of the Richard Rogers architecture on visitor understanding of wine production. Open to individuals and groups by reservation.

wine_schools.name: Bodegas Emilio Moro Wine Education Tastings
wine_schools.address: Ctra. Penafiel-Vitoria s/n, 47315 Pesquera de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
program_types: Wine Speaks to You guided tasting
Taste our Ribera four-wine comparative flight
wine_schools.description: Producer-led educational tasting programme at Bodegas Emilio Moro on the Golden Mile. Three experiential formats from a guided three-wine tasting through vineyard exploration to a full pairing experience with Castilian gastronomy. Led by enologists and the Moro family.

verified.address_quoted: Ctra. Penafiel-Vitoria, S/N, 47315 Pesquera de Duero, Valladolid

wine_schools.name: Pago de Carraovejas 6 Senses Wine Experience
wine_schools.address: Camino de Carraovejas s/n, 47300 Penafiel, Valladolid, Spain
program_types: Grand Crus of Alma vertical tasting
wine_schools.description: Comprehensive wine and terroir education programme at Pago de Carraovejas. The 4-hour 6 Senses experience covers viticulture, vinification and sensory analysis in stages; the Grand Crus of Alma format takes the most advanced guests through diversity of single-pago vinifications. One of the most thorough producer-led educational experiences in the region.

verified.address_quoted: Camino de Carraovejas, s/n, 47300 Penafiel, Valladolid, Espana

wine_schools.name: Bodegas Legaris Barrel and Blending Workshop
wine_schools.address: Ctra. Penafiel-Encinas de Esgueva Km. 2,5, Curiel de Duero, Valladolid, Spain
program_types: From the Barrel to the Senses tasting experience
wine_schools.description: Structured barrel and blending education at Bodegas Legaris in Curiel de Duero. The 2.5-hour Barrel to Senses session covers blending theory with practical exploration; theoretical explanation about barrel influence on Tempranillo. Available for groups of 6-30 people, Monday to Saturday by reservation.

verified.address_quoted: Ctra. Penafiel-Encinas de Esgueva, Km. 2,5, Curiel de Duero, Valladolid
